error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: API key authentication failure due to malformed JWT
symptom: Users encounter an 'Authorization failed - please check your credentials' error with a 'jwt malformed' message when trying to authenticate with their API keys.
applies_when: API keys are being used for authentication
not_this_if: No API keys are being used
root_cause: The error occurs due to a bug in the newer versions of n8n where the API keys may have become invalid or malformed after a recent update, leading to authentication failures.
fix_steps: Recreate the API key in the n8n interface
Update your application or workflow to use the new API key
agent_instruction: Recreate the API key and update your application with the new key.
